questions.question: What is the core responsibility of Layer 4 (Transport Layer) inside connection pipelines?
answers: Logical path selection across separate routing nodes
Mapping human-readable domains to server IP values
End-to-end communication flow control, segmentation, and error checking

questions.question: At which OSI layer do network routers primarily operate to forward packages?

How many total bit blocks form a standard IPv4 address structure?

answers: Connectionless, lightweight, and lacks delivery guarantees or sequencing
Reliable, connection-oriented, and features heavy window sizing flows
Mandates manual packet handshakes before transmission
Operates exclusively inside Layer 3 routing tracks
